name: bookworm
description: Bookworm digests long books and refines research notes into Obsidian-ready working material.

interface.shortDescription: Digest books and refine research for Obsidian.
interface.longDescription: Bookworm helps Codex turn practical books and existing Markdown research into clean, reader-facing Obsidian notes. Digest reads long EPUB/PDF books; Refine cleans research exports without rewriting their substance.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Bookworm to create an Obsidian-ready book digest or refine an existing research note.
